title: orchis alba
intro: Orchis alba, also known as the white orchid or vanilla orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orchis alba include its ability to treat conditions such as respiratory issues, gastrointestinal problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Orchis alba is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
